content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The sky of the battlefield ruins cracked, and a terrifying aura was transmitted.

It was not an ordinary breath, but a breath that belonged to the Dao Ancestor.

However, compared to the real Dao Ancestor, this aura was relatively weak, as if it was the power of the Dao Ancestor who was many times weaker.

"It's ...... Dao Ancestor Incarnation !!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The Dao Ancestor incarnation actually entered the battlefield ruins, which represented a signal that the Dao Ancestor incarnation was going to meddle in the affairs of the quasi-Dao realm and the battlefield ruins.

Obviously, the opportunity of the battlefield ruins made the Dao Ancestors who were high above all moved, and they came to the Quasi-Dao Realm at any cost.

You must know that when the Dao Ancestor descends to the incarnation to enter the quasi-Dao realm, it also needs to pay a price, and the stronger the power that the incarnation has, the more price and backlash will be paid.

In addition, the battlefield relics are not simple, and the Dao Ancestor incarnation descends on the battlefield relics, and it also needs to pay a huge price.

Compared to the harvest, these costs were worth it for the Dao Ancestors.

"I don't know which Dao Ancestor it is?"

Ye Tian muttered in his heart.

There are too many Dao Ancestors in Chaos, although they are far less than the True Ancestors, but they are far beyond Ye Tian's imagination, after all, a top power has at least one Dao Ancestor, and there are so many top forces in Chaos, at least thousands!

And some of the top big forces have at least a few Dao Ancestors, and even some of the top big forces have Dao Ancestors above double digits, such as Chaos Trading House, Giant Axe City, and other real top big forces, the number of Dao Ancestors has always been a mystery.

On the bright side, there are tens of thousands of Dao Ancestors in the chaos, plus the Dao Ancestors in the secret, I am afraid that there are 100,000.

After all, the years of chaos have been too long, countless universes have been destroyed since birth, I don't know how many reincarnations have lasted, and there are many, many Dao realms in chaos.

It's just that the chaos is too big, and if the Dao Realm is scattered, this makes the Dao Realm very rare.

There were so many Dao Ancestors in Chaos, so Ye Tian didn't know which Dao Ancestor had come this time, and he had only seen a few Dao Ancestors.

"I hope it's not a Dao Ancestor who has an enmity with the Void Heaven!"

Ye Tian thought secretly.

If this Dao Ancestor has a grudge against the Void Heaven, then this Dao Ancestor probably doesn't mind killing him.

He thought that his strength was very strong, but the realm of the Dao Ancestors was too high, even if the power of the incarnation was not strong, it was enough to exert the terrifying strength.

In case the power of this Dao Ancestor incarnation was very strong, it would be enough to kill him easily.

Soon, the incarnation of this Dao Ancestor completely descended on the battlefield ruins.

......

"This is the remnants of the battlefield, finally in!"

A young man in golden armor and armed with a black spear stepped on the void and muttered.

For the first time, his eyes were fixed on the dojo, his eyes full of greed and excitement.

"A dojo, and it is also a dojo with Dao Inheritance, if I break through this Dojo, I will definitely be able to obtain Dao Inheritance, and my strength will inevitably increase significantly!"

The young man thought.

And at this time, Ye Tian was observing this Dao Ancestor.

Copying talent is impossible to probe the situation of the Dao Ancestor, which Ye Tian has known for a long time, so he can't know the situation of this Dao Ancestor either.

As for why copying talent would not be able to detect Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian guessed that this was a problem with the level of copying talent, unless the copying talent was upgraded again, there was no way to detect the situation of Dao Ancestor's strong talent at this level.

But Ye Tian could probe the talent of any True Ancestor without any restrictions.

"It's a pity that it's too difficult to upgrade the copy talent, I can obviously feel that the copy talent can be upgraded, but I just haven't found the upgraded treasure!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, even so, copying talent is still very useful these days.

For example, merging various talents, allowing him to cultivate chaotic supernatural powers without restrictions, or probing the existence of other people, etc.

The copying talent could not detect the situation of this Dao Ancestor, but from the dress of this Dao Ancestor and the black spear with a special pattern, it was vaguely possible to guess his identity.

"This should be the Moon Sweeping Dao Ancestor of the Tower of Doom!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Lanyue Dao Ancestor is not a very strong Dao Ancestor, he is just a Dao Ancestor in the early stage of Merge Dao, and he has not mastered Dao Techniques, and his strength is far from comparable to that of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian only knew the names and origins of a small number of Dao Ancestors from the Void Heaven Palace, and the Lanyue Dao Ancestor happened to be one.

What made Ye Tian breathe a sigh of relief was that the Lanyue Dao Ancestor did not have a grudge against the Void Sky First Pulse, if he took the Void Sky First Pulse as his position, the Lanyue Dao Ancestor was almost a neutral faction, and he had no deal with the Void Sky First Pulse, and he would not be able to target the Void Sky First Pulse.

Therefore, Lanyue Dao Ancestor would not kill him as soon as he saw him, otherwise Ye Tian would also be a little distressed.

Although Lanyue Dao Ancestor is not strong, who knows what killer skills this Dao Ancestor incarnation will master, so he doesn't want to fight with this Dao Ancestor incarnation.

At this time, Lanyue Dao Ancestor also noticed Ye Tian, no matter how Ye Tian hid, it was difficult to avoid Lanyue Dao Ancestor's divine sense.

"Boy, come here!"

Lanyue Dao Ancestor said coldly.

Ye Tian flew over and said respectfully, "May I ask if it is the ancestor of the Lanyue Dao Ancestor?"

"Oh, you recognize me?"

Lanyue Daozu was slightly surprised.

The Dao Ancestors don't see the end of the dragon, and the true monarchs don't necessarily know how many Dao Ancestors, and his Moon Dao Ancestor is not very famous in the chaos, and there are really not many true monarchs who know him.

"I happen to know Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

"Which force are you the Dao Ancestor?"

Lanyue Daozu asked.

"Void Heaven One Pulse, Void Heaven Dao Ancestor Disciple Ye Tian!"

Ye Tian reported.

"Void Heaven Dao Ancestor's personal disciple, could it be that you are the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son of the Void Heaven One Line?" Lanyue Dao Ancestor also recognized Ye Tian, after all, he had also inquired about the situation in the Quasi-Dao Realm, so he hadn't heard of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son who was the first on the Quasi-Dao Realm's True Monarch List.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian replied.

Lanyue Dao Ancestor stared at Ye Tian, nodded and said, "Yes, Xutian Dao Ancestor has accepted a good apprentice, and he can overwhelm so many True Monarchs and become the No. 1 True Monarch in the Quasi-Dao Realm." "

Lanyue Dao Ancestor praised Ye Tian, and then said: "Ye Tian, I want to know the situation of this dojo, a true monarch under my command is located here, but now there is no trace of him, he must have fallen." So, I don't know anything about this ashram. "

Ye Tian said the basic situation of the dojo, but did not mention the secret of the Red Dragon Pool.

After listening to this, Lanyue Daozu nodded secretly.

The True Monarch under his command only transmitted the news of the dojo and the inheritance of Taoism, and there was no way to transmit anything else, after all, it was very difficult to transmit news across this kind of cross, and gradually only a little message could be transmitted.

Compared with Ye Tian's news, he had a general understanding of the situation here.

Obviously, the value of this dojo is very high, it's just that the spirit of the dojo is a little troublesome, but that's all.

"Ye Tian, how about you enter the dojo ruins with me?"

Lanyue Daozu said softly.

But his tone was full of threats, if Ye Tian agreed, I am afraid that there would be no good fruit to eat.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

He guessed that Lanyue Dao Ancestor wanted to monopolize this dojo, and he was afraid that he would inform other Dao Ancestor incarnations, so he wanted to keep him here, as for why he didn't kill him, it was probably because he didn't want to offend the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

But if he didn't agree, Lanyue Dao Ancestor didn't mind killing him, and for this reason, he didn't hesitate to offend the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor to occupy this dojo.

That's the value of the dojo!

Ye Tian didn't want to fight with Lanyue Dao Ancestor for the time being, so he could only agree to enter the Red Dragon Dojo!

He is very confident in his own strength, even if Jiong of the Red Dragon Dojo wants to make a move against him, he is sure to save his life.

Moreover, the threat of the Dao Ancestor incarnation is the greatest, and if Jiong really wants to make a move, I am afraid that the other party will also take the Moon Dao Ancestor, and will not target him.

Ye Tian and Lanyue Daozu stepped into the medicine garden one after the other.
